_meta.description: Multi-let light industrial (MLI) filter rules for VOA rating list entries
_meta.purpose: Isolate MLI hereditaments from the full 2-million-record VOA dataset
_meta.source: VOA Rating List Data Specification, Appendix 2 (SCat codes)

step_1_scat_include.description: Only retain hereditaments with these SCat codes

codes.name: Factories, Workshops and Warehouses (Incl Bakeries & Dairies)
codes.rationale: Core MLI — general-purpose factories, workshops and warehouses. Primary target of small-unit industrial investment.

codes.name: Business Units
codes.rationale: Purpose-built small industrial/office units typically 100-500 m². Quintessentially MLI.

codes.name: Industrial Miscellaneous
codes.rationale: Catch-all for industrial properties not otherwise classified. Small-format occupiers often sit here.

step_2_scat_exclude.description: Explicitly exclude these SCat codes even if they passed step 1

codes.name: Large Industrials (Over 20,000m²)
codes.rationale: Large industrial is structurally different from MLI — big-box occupiers, single-tenant. Explicitly named as 'Over 20,000m²' by VOA.

codes.name: Distribution Warehouses
codes.rationale: Logistics / e-commerce distribution is a different sub-sector. Large-format, single-tenant big-box.

codes.name: High Tech Warehouses
codes.rationale: Specialist tech warehouses — not general-purpose MLI.

codes.name: Self-Storage Facility
codes.rationale: Self-storage is not an industrial occupier category — it's a retail-adjacent service.

codes.name: Land Used For Storage
codes.rationale: Open storage land is not built industrial stock.

step_3_size_filter.description: Retain only units with GIA under 464 m² (≈ 5,000 sqft)
step_3_size_filter.measurement_source: Summary valuations file, record type 01 field 17 (Total Area), when field 28 (Unit of Measurement) = 'GIA'

handling_of_unknowns.missing_floorspace: Record retained but flagged with size_unverified=true. Counts toward unit_count metric but NOT toward stock_sqft total (since area is unknown).
handling_of_unknowns.non_gia_measurement: If Unit of Measurement is NIA/GEA/EFA/RCA/OTH, treated as size_unverified since the value can't be directly compared to a 464m² GIA threshold.
handling_of_unknowns.rationale: VOA floorspace coverage is approximately 80%. Discarding the remaining 20% would bias results toward better-documented markets. We retain records but flag them.

step_4_active_only.description: Retain only currently-live entries on the 2026 list

rules.rationale: Per VOA spec: deleted hereditaments appear as proxy records with null RV. These are not true list entries and must be excluded.

rules.rule: Drop if Current To Date is non-null AND < 2026-04-01
rules.rationale: If the entry ceased to be current before the 2026 list compilation date, it's historic.

voa_mli_stock_sqft.formula: sum of GIA (converted to sqft) across MLI-filtered records in market
voa_mli_stock_sqft.coverage_note: Reports coverage % so users see how much of the market is documented

voa_mli_unit_count.formula: count of MLI-filtered hereditaments in market
voa_mli_unit_count.rationale: Unit count is about market depth, not stock sqft — we want all MLI units in.

voa_mli_concentration_pct.formula: (count of industrial units <464m² GIA) / (count of all industrial units, no size filter, same SCat include set minus exclusions) × 100
voa_mli_concentration_pct.rationale: Measures market character — high % indicates MLI-dominated structure, favourable for MLI investors. Flagged as insufficient data below 60% floorspace coverage.

voa_mli_new_supply.rationale: Net change in MLI unit count over 3 years. Positive = new supply, negative = demolition/change of use. Rating logic: less net new supply is better for MLI investors (rent tension).
